recent_notes.content: Integrated PyO3 Rust extension into our Python RAG retriever. Embedding alignment computation latency dropped from 15ms to 1.2ms.
Vector chunk overlap sizes are often arbitrary. Optimizing them with semantic layout splits yields far cleaner context than strict token boundaries.
Finetuning small 3B/8B models on targeted domain parameters is consistently yielding higher benchmark accuracy than zero-shot prompting 70B models.

experiences.description: Working on open-source projects, collaborating with developers, reviewing code, and contributing to production-quality software.
Founded and leading a growing technical community focused on AI, open source, GitHub resources, APIs, developer tools, and collaborative learning.
Worked on real-world open-source projects focused on AI-powered educational technology and India-centric software solutions, collaborating directly with academic mentors.
Promoted AI adoption, organized community engagement initiatives, created educational content, and gathered user product feedback.

education.degree: BS in Data Science and Applications

currently: Currently learning more about AI systems, modern web technologies, and open-source software while writing technical articles and building real-world projects.

quote_of_the_day.text: Simplicity is a great virtue but it requires hard work to achieve it and education to appreciate it.
quote_of_the_day.author: Edsger W. Dijkstra
